untranslatable_reason: Signal requires filtering for 'largest 20% moves' (1.28 standard deviations) as a qualifying condition before entry signals trigger. No backtest engine indicator exists to identify and filter only the top 20th percentile of 1-day moves. This contextual filter cannot be expressed using the allowed indicators and operators. The raw entry conditions (1.96% decline / 2.24% rise) are translatable but incomplete without the percentile-based move qualification.
translation_notes: Entry conditions use returns (decimal scale: -0.0196 for -1.96%, +0.0224 for +2.24%). Exit conditions reversed as reversion signals. Hold period set to 2 days. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal alternates between long and short based on price direction. Critical missing element: pre-qualification filter for largest 20% daily moves.
